---
title: "George Lillie Craik"
---

## George Lillie Craik

**Dates:** (1837-1905)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

A partner in Macmillan, he married (29 April 1865) the novelist Dinah Maria Mulock (1826-1887).

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 15th 1901
- Letter from Oct 9th 1900
- Letter from Febry 24th 1896
- Letter from July 21st 1894
- Letter from March 27th 1894
- Letter from Aug 8th 1893
- Letter from April 21st [1893]
- Letter from Feb 1st 1893
- Letter from Jany 17th 1893
- Letter from Jan 15th 1893
- Letter from Jan 25th 1892 [1893]
- Letter from Aug 4th 1890
- Letter from June 9th1890
- Letter from May 22d 1889
- Letter from Feb 19th 1889
- Letter from Jany 31st 1889
- Letter from Jan 29th 1889
- Letter from July 28th 1886
- Letter from July 24th [1886]
- Letter from June 29th [1886]

*... and 76 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
